summary: Iteration 76: Sanity Check Audit - Phase 1 + Phase 2 Features PASS. Backend: 33/33 tests pass. Frontend: All pages load correctly, Phantom tab Gabagool fix verified (no crash), EPOCH 4 label visible, all 6 experiment tabs working.

backend_api_tests: test_phantom_gabagool_stats - PASS: gabagool stats object present
frontend_ui_tests: Overview page loads with PnL data (+$36.89 daily) - PASS
Overview shows all strategies active (Structural Arbitrage, Crypto Sniper, Weather Trader) - PASS
Overview shows Feed Health (Polymarket Connected, Binance WS Connected) - PASS
Quant Lab page loads with data-testid='quant-lab-page' - PASS
All 6 experiment tabs visible (EV-Gap, MoonDev, Phantom, Whrrari, Marik, Argona) - PASS
Phantom tab loads without crash (gabagoolOpenCols/gabagoolClosedCols fix verified) - PASS
Phantom tab shows Gabagool Both-Sides card with stats - PASS
Phantom tab shows One-Side Spread card - PASS
Phantom tab shows all 5 data tabs (Gabagool Open/Closed, One-Side Open/Closed, Evaluations) - PASS
Phantom Gabagool Open table renders with data - PASS
Whrrari tab loads with 3 mode cards (Unit-Size, Sandbox Notional, Crypto-Mirrored) - PASS
Whrrari tab shows Engine Metrics and Config - PASS
MoonDev tab loads with metrics and positions - PASS
Sniper page shows active trading with 7 open positions - PASS
Sniper page shows dynamic sizing (sizes 5, 8, 10, 15, 21, 25) - PASS

phase1_dynamic_kelly_sizing.evidence: Sniper health shows position_capped field, rejection_reasons includes risk:projected position > max entries

phase1_window_aware_position_caps.evidence: Sniper positions show varying sizes (5, 8, 10, 15, 21, 25) based on window/edge

phase2_phantom_gabagool.evidence: Phantom report shows gabagool_threshold=0.96, gabagool stats object with pnl_total, win_rate, closed_trades

phantom_tab_gabagool_fix.evidence: Phantom tab renders without crash, gabagoolOpenCols and gabagoolClosedCols defined at line 844-865 in QuantLab.jsx

epoch4_label.evidence: EPOCH 4 label visible in Quant Lab header

experiments_registry.evidence: 6 experiments returned: shadow_sniper, moondev, phantom, whrrari (active), marik, argona (planned)

critical_code_review_comments: QuantLab.jsx: gabagoolOpenCols and gabagoolClosedCols correctly defined at lines 844-865
All shadow engines (MoonDev, Phantom, Whrrari) returning correct status and metrics
Sniper health endpoint correctly exposes Phase 1 fields (dislocation_filtered, position_capped)
Phantom Gabagool both-sides mode working with threshold=0.96
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live shadow engine data after EPOCH 4 reset
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 validated the sanity check audit for Phase 1 + Phase 2 features. Key findings: (1) All backend APIs healthy - /api/status, /api/positions, /api/trades, /api/diagnostics return 200, (2) Sniper health shows Phase 1 fields: dislocation_filtered, position_capped, rejection_reasons with risk:projected position entries, (3) Phantom Gabagool both-sides mode working with threshold=0.96, gabagool stats object present, (4) Phantom tab renders without crash - gabagoolOpenCols/gabagoolClosedCols fix verified, (5) EPOCH 4 label visible in Quant Lab, (6) All 6 experiment tabs working (4 active, 2 planned), (7) Sniper page shows dynamic sizing with varying position sizes. Server was recently reset (EPOCH 4) so some counters are still collecting data.
